title: Void's Titans
description: This Datapack will add 26 new bosses and 4 new superbosses! The Titans are nothing short of walking calamities.
body:
(no video yet, that will probably be for v2.0 when i update it)

# Introduction
So this pack is inspired by enderman-of-d00m's Titans Mod, and like it ive included almost every single hostile mob as a titan. There is 30 titans, 8 lesser titans, 10 average titans, 8 greater titans, and 4 god titans. this datapack isnt a straight rip from that mod, instead it has its own unique armor, titans, designs for weapons and titans, and lore. and instead of making the titans feel like big overpowering bosses I made them feel like walking calamities that randomly spawn (some dont spawn like witherzilla, executor dragon, sculkstoroyah, giant titan, snowgolem titan, and the ultima iron golem titan), and some spawn all over the over world some spawn in other dimensions and some you just have to find by going to there domain or summon them yourself. now they dont spawn very often (im talking about they have a chance twice a day, and if it lands in the 3 out of 100 chance then it has to pick from the titan and if its not a titan that can spawn there then it wont spawn anything) but youll know if a titan spawns by the titan spirit/ titan vessel youll see floating around gaining health until it becomes its titan.

# Titans
As stated above the titans can be divided into 4 catigories, each one more or less deadly and destructive, Lesser titans like Omegafish and Titan Phantom have a difficulty that surpasses netherite but is under absence and in destruction potency of at least big house level to most village block level in , Average titans like Zombie Titan and Skeleton Titan have a difficulty that matches absence armor level and a destruction potency that matches half village level, Greater titans like Ghast Titan and Ender Colossus are above absence armor but below atheisium armor and have an destruction potency of whole village level, and finally God titans are the main 3 plus one secret one. Witherzilla, Executor Dragon, and Sculkstoroyah, and Giant Titan (you have to manually summon this one). each of them are in a league of there own and have 3 phases (except for the giant titan), they are slightly above atheisium armor and have an destruction potency above village level, there mere presence especially if mad clears all surrounding entities and they all (if not in first phase definitely in second) require atheisium armor or else youll meet the same fate as the lesser mobs they clear.

You can summon them using /function summon: or use Titan serum to summon them (except for witherzilla and executor dragon since they reside in there own dimensions)

# Items and Weapons
there are numorous items but it just comes down to whats under /function give: or whats in the crafting menu, in order to craft the armors you need special unobtainable blocks, made obtainable by killing average and greater titans, for absence armor and the absence sword you need bedrock to craft structure voids to craft the armor and sword, for atheisium you need command blocks from killing ender colossuses and you craft that into enlightenment (essentially light blocks) then into the armor and sword, the ultima blade gets dropped from witherzilla, the optima axe gets dropped by executor dragon, and the ultra hammer gets dropped by sculkstoroyah. each one of them has various ablities that stem from what there god represents.

(witherzilla is balance, executor dragon is entropy, sculkstoroyah is null)

The creepy wither doll and rng relinquisher are the ways you get to 2 of the god titans, by going into The End and clicking them they transport you there, versus the sculkstoroyah is met by you splashing a warden with titan serum as his soul lives within all the sculk. Speaking of Titan serum, you can splash almost everything hostile (or iron golem and snow golem) and get that titan from it.

# Final words
This datapack was actually inspired by one of my favorite youtubers videos, he covered a newly released titans mod for neo-forge and I found the spark to make this datapack! so thanks to Arox for inspiring me to make this! and this datapack will be getting more updates and possibly a video from me but thats it for this one.
